mapper.select:
SELECT NO , TITLE , CONTENT , WRITER , TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE 1=1
AND TITLE LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND CONTENT LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND WRITER LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
ORDER BY NO DESC OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * 10 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM NOTICE WHERE 1=1
AND TITLE LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND CONTENT LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND WRITER LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
SELECT NO , TITLE , CONTENT , WRITER , REG_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE NO = #{no}
